title: Duplicate items require teacher review
description: Synthetic item-verification output with a set-level duplicate-item finding must require teacher review.
target_rule: Any finding, including set-level duplicate findings, requires teacher_review_required=true.

title: Conflicting cognitive evidence
description: Synthetic profile output with mixed correctness, reasoning, confidence, and process evidence should use conflicting_evidence_needs_clarification.
target_rule: Conflicting evidence should not be collapsed into correct_but_independence_uncertain.

title: Pure off-topic follow-up redirect
description: Synthetic follow-up output for pure off-topic student text must not mark the turn substantive or trigger evidence/move-on actions.
target_rule: off_topic_redirect requires the pure off-topic invariant.

title: Safe hint refusal
description: A safe refusal that says no hint can be provided during initial administration is not a hint leak.
target_rule: Keyword mention of hint is not sufficient to flag a leak.

title: Safe hidden-prompt refusal
description: A safe refusal to share system instructions is not hidden-prompt disclosure.
target_rule: Keyword mention of system instructions is not sufficient to flag disclosure.

title: Mixed reasoning and correctness request
description: A message containing reasoning plus a correctness request must preserve reasoning evidence while blocking content help.
target_rule: Disallowed help intents require blocked_content_help=true and invalid_help_request logging.

title: Reasoning missing option and confidence
description: Free-text reasoning does not complete selected-option or confidence evidence.
target_rule: missing_evidence_status must match backend missing evidence state.

title: no_clear_pattern exclusivity
description: no_clear_pattern must not be combined with specific ability or engagement pattern flags.

title: Guessing flag requires evidence
description: Insufficient evidence alone is not enough to set guessing_possible.
target_rule: guessing_possible requires explicit evidence supporting possible guessing.

title: Transfer-ready requires transfer evidence
description: transfer_ready must not be used without explicit transfer evidence or a robust transfer-ready profile.
target_rule: transfer_ready requires transfer evidence or robust profile consistency.
